feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Build Apps
feed.subtitle: SAP Build Apps Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Unable to consume RAP web api in SAP Build App and Action
entry.content:
Hi Team,

  I have build a RAP Web API. But unable to consume in SAP Build Apps. Throwing error mentioned in screenshots. Can you please help.

SAP Build Apps errors.

 

SAP Build Apps -  Action errors

 

Thanks,

Anjan Paul

entry.title: import prototype from SAP build.me (SAP build classics) to SAP build Apps
entry.content:
Hello experts.

How can I import a created prototype from SAP build Classic into the new SAP Build Apps? 
I can download the prototype as a zip file from build classic, but in SAP Build Apps I can only add a project as an mtar or gpg file.

Thanks in advance

Sebastian

entry.title: SAP IAS User group patch action is not working from Build Process Automation
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We are using the Identity directory API for the Patch action of the group. I have created the user using IAS action, wanted to move the user to specific Group. From Business accelerator Hub I am able to move the user to desired group, but from action group it is giving me error 400.

I am following the below steps:

  1. Login to SAP Build Process lobby, navigate to action section.
  2. Add the Identity provider API Action Project.
  3. Add the Group Patch Action to the project
  4. And execute the Patch action with provided input as Group Id 
  5. And operation as "xxxxx", path as "xxxxx" and value as "xxxxx"

    Attached screenshot for your reference:

     

    ERROR: 

Could you please help me or any suggestion to resolve this issue?

Thanks,

Rupesh

entry.title: SAP Build Apps QR Code generation issue on mobile device
entry.content:
Hello,
I am building a simple app, that gets an QR code from an image URL.

On the SAP Build Apps Web Application it works perfectly (see the "Screenshot 2023-06-16...png").
The same App opened on the SAP Build Apps mobile device (in my case, an iOS phone, see "qr code on mobile device.jpeg), it does not show the QR code (I gave the image url element two different frames to see, to see if they are existent at all).

So you see the QR codes are somewhat existent (the app seems to read the format and gives them a border that I customized). 
Any idea on what to do here to make it work?
When I use the "open in browser" function it works. But I want the QR code to be directly available on the screen, just as in the WebApp where it is already working.

entry.title: SAP Build Apps Select Option in Basic Table with Data Adapter
entry.content:
Hi,

I'm using the "Basic Table with Data Adapter" component in SAP Build Apps to show Purchase Requisitions from a connected Backend System. Is there any option to add a select option the table, similar to the  "List Item" component, to jump to a specific item for details?

Anyhow: Is the Basic Table the "go to" solution for this use case? Many Thanks! Max

entry.title: Integration SAP Build Apps with Process Automation without API
entry.content:
Hi SAP Builders,

I want to integrate SAP Build Apps with Process Automation to trigger a process without using an API, described here:

https://help.sap.com/docs/build-apps/service-guide/sap-build-library

Trigger a process in SAP Build Process Automation ... - SAP Community

Somehow this doesn't work in my case. I created a Process with API trigger with a variable as Process Input and published it to the Library

In SAP Build Apps the process was added succesfully

A page variable type "object" was added 

For the button i added the Trigger Process component and added the necessary properties:

What am I missing here?  The "old" way with the "Create Record" component works as expected.

Many thanks! Max

entry.title: Displaying data using SAP BTP Destination REST API Integration
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

Quick question, why my preview page goes blank when I want to display data using SAP BTP Destination REST API Integration?

The test is OK (200). This is my steps:

Configure the SAP BTP Destination REST API Integration -> Create a data variable -> Drag container and a text -> Set the container to repeat with data variable -> Set the text content with data item in repeat

I also try to use basic table with data adapter, this is what I got: 

Best regards,

Isyraf

entry.title: Date Control is not rendered properly in SAP Build Apps
entry.content:
Hello Team,

Date component is rendering behind the table and user is not able to select the date as well.

entry.title: Get logged in user data in SAP Build Work Zone Advance edition
entry.content: I have deployed an application and made a tile in sap build workzone advance edition. In the deployed application I want to send the userId/Usercode/email any of the mentioned which is assigned to me in the payload. Help me to get the login data from sap build workzone advance edition.

entry.title: SAP Build Apps access denied
entry.content:
Hi,
I created an SAP Build Apps instance via Booster but cannot access it.
I gave my user all the roles (I am an admin additionally). 
Also, inside the Trust Config its all setup.
Also, inside the Cloud Identity Services there are my users set up.
The SAP Build App application is also there, but I do not know what is missing to make it work.
Any ideas?

entry.title: SAP Build Apps Identity Directory Rest API Integration
entry.content:
Hi,

Could you please help me to use the "Overview | Identity Directory API | SAP Business Accelerator Hub" in SAP Build Apps to show the available BTP DirectoryUsers?

A destination was created with the URL "https:/.....ondemand.com/scim/Users" and the connection tested succesfully.

In SAP Build Apps, I added the  REST API and the Test API call returns data.

The Goal is to show the User Names in a repeated List Item. For that I added the formula "data.User[""].Resources" with primary Label "current.displayName". In the Preview it seems to get the data, but in the preview, nothing is shown.

Could you please advise, what I am missing here? Many thanks! Max

entry.title: how to call calculation view in Build Apps
entry.content:
Hi

In SAP Build apps we have successfully connect to SAP Business One Service layer and also able to call the Objects data, we have a calculation view which is exposed in Service layer which needs to be called, how to call the same and use the data in Build apps for further visualization and development

entry.title: SAP Build app transaction data not being saved to Visual cloud function DB
entry.content:
Hi Community Members,

I am trying to create a Build app & bound the data of Build app data entry fields to Visual Could function entity fields.

Transaction screen Page in Canvas Submit button on tap event "Create data record" Data Function is used.

Data Variable linkage to VCF entity is maintained

But while testing the app data is being saved to VCF DB with a blank record means only UUID is auto inserted but rest of the fields are still blank. (Screen shot attached), can anyone help here to know what went wrong ?

entry.title: How do I retrieve projects from an expired SAP BTP Trial Account?
entry.content: I would like to know if there is anyway to recover projects from an expired SAP BTP Trial Account? I have previously built an app in SAP Build Apps, but I have only exported the app in .zip file. However, the SAP Build Apps import feature does not support importing of .zip files and only accepts .mtar and .gpg files. Or is there anyway to convert .zip files into one of the acceptable file formats? Any help is appreciated. Thanks.

entry.title: How to trigger Build Process Automation (BPA) workflow through Business Application Studio?
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Greetings!

I have a requirement to trigger Build Process Automation from Custom UI5 application developed in BAS. I have gone through multiple tutorials but all are suggesting the triggering of BPA from Build Apps. 

Please guide me on this.

Thanks & Regards,

Ayushi Shrivastava

entry.title: migrate it to SAP build
entry.content:
Hi, I did not receive the notification about Appgyver to SAP migration. I cannot access the old appgyver app anymore after the migration deadline. Is there any way for rescuing the old app and migrate it to SAP build app now? Thanks!!

__PRESENT

entry.title: SAP Build Apps Integration with SBPA (Task UI)
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Is it possible to use SAP Build Apps as the task UI in SAP Build Process Automation.

Thanks & Regards,
Keerthana

entry.title: SAP BPA Error while passing payload using postman - please help
entry.content:
I have created a BPA  with 3 inputs

I am in the Editable version and tested the Automation, it was completed successfully, and after that released and  Deployed the Process, now what I wanted is, I want to pass the JSON payload using POSTMAN but that is creating error 

 

Error message: The activity 'automation_getCreatedJobStatus_1' cannot be started since the input is not correct: [[/INPUT_JOBS/TABLES/JOB_LIST/0/JobCount] The value must be of string type, but actual type is integer.],[[/INPUT_JOBS/TABLES/JOB_LIST/1/JobCount] The value must be of string type, but actual type is integer.],[[/INPUT_JOBS/TABLES/JOB_LIST/2/JobCount] The value must be of string type, but actual type is integer.],[[/INPUT_JOBS/TABLES/JOB_LIST/3/Job Count] The value must be of string type, but actual type is integer.]
Log ID:6888f174-b33b-4a02-b706-be6956b-us10

(screenshot attached below)

 

SAP Build Process Automation SAP Build SAP Business Workflow SAP Business Process Automation by Redwood@Ron_Hagan

entry.title: SAP Build Apps asking login for Integrations
entry.content:
Hi,

I am following the tutorial in the Task 2: Install Data Integration and I am getting the below popup every time I select my BTP Destination as my trail account. Also, as mentioned in the exercise, if I search with S4HC_SAMLASSERTION_PO or MOCK_PURCHASE_ORDER, it is not showing me any values. I am using my BTP trail account. Please help me on how to proceed on this.

 

 

 

 

Thanks,

Bharath

entry.title: Dynamic Text Size based on device type in SAP Build Apps
entry.content:
HI All,

I am currently working on a project in SAP Build Apps and have encountered an issue that I need your assistance with. Here’s a brief overview of the problem:

**Issue:**

I have a “Title” component in my application for which I have applied a style. Specifically, I have set the text size to "Header 1" using a dropdown in the style settings. While this size is perfect for desktop browsers, it appears too large on mobile browsers. I would like to dynamically change the text size to "Header 2" when the application is running on a mobile browser and revert it back to "Header 1" when it is on a desktop browser.

 

**Requirement:**

- On mobile browsers: Text size should change to "Header 2".

- On desktop browsers: Text size should remain as "Header 1".

 

Could you please guide me on how to achieve this dynamic adjustment based on the device type?
